content.en:
Two hours later.

Ye Tian not only completely fused the three talents, but also recovered.

After fusing these three talents, Ye Tian discovered an amazing thing.

The source speed talent is the same as the speed talent, the source knife talent should be the sword talent, and the source fire talent is the fire talent, which contains many characteristics of the fire talent.

It stands to reason that these three talents are the same as the speed talent, the sword talent, and the fire talent, why are they called the source speed talent, the source knife talent, and the source fire talent?

It is impossible to copy the talent by taking the name casually, it must be because it is a different talent.

"What is the reason?"

Ye Tian muttered.

He used three talents again and again, wanting to know the special nature of these three talents, but because the divine consciousness soul power was suppressed, it was difficult to probe the soul, so it was difficult to distinguish.

"Forget it, let's check it slowly after I get out, now that I'm suppressed here, it's hard to know why!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

At this moment, he sensed that one of the source people was coming towards him, apparently looking for him.

In the source land, it is useless to hide, no matter how much you hide, the nearby source people will find it.

At this moment, it was the Source Knife Talent Source Man who attacked.

Soon, the source knife talent source man came.

Ye Tian fought with him, but found that the source of this source knife talent had a trace of the shadow of the silk knife technique, but this knife technique was very peculiar, and it was not any series of knife techniques that Ye Tian had ever seen.

This is a series of knife techniques that conform to the rules of the source.

Ye Tian did not immediately kill this source person, but continued to fight with him, absorbing the characteristics of the sword technique on his body so that he could understand the rules of this source place.

After fighting for a long time, Ye Tian knew that he couldn't learn more from this source person, so he killed him with one sword.

Next, Ye Tian killed the source man who had the talent of source fire.

Time passed day by day, Ye Tian only waited for the source people at first, but then he began to take the initiative to find the source people to kill, and he didn't know how many source people he had killed.

Ten years later.

Ye Tian has a lot of combat experience, it stands to reason that ten years of fighting is nothing, but a lot of combat experience from the outside world is not suitable here, and Ye Tian has redeveloped a kind of combat experience suitable for the source here.

In addition, Ye Tian's talent at the moment has completely transformed, he has fused many kinds of talents, and upgraded all the talents such as the Source Knife Talent and the Source Speed Talent.

Host: Ye Tian

Source Talent: Advanced

Source Talent: Advanced

Source Talent: Advanced

Source Knife Talent: Advanced

Source Sword Talent: Advanced

Source Fire Talent: Advanced

Source Soil Talent: Advanced

Source Gold Talent: Advanced

......

In addition to the time and space talents, Ye Tian collected all the talents of other attributes.

In addition, he collected all kinds of martial arts from the source people, and also created several moves that were suitable for this world.

They are two sword techniques, a body technique, and a five-element secret technique.

The two sword techniques are the Instant Slash and the Sky Splitting Strike, although they are not advanced sword skills, but they make his strength skyrocket.

And that body method is called the phantom body method, and the Five Elements Secret Technique is a five-star source realm created by fusing the five talents of source fire talent, source earth talent, source gold talent, source water talent and source wood talent, and the power is very terrifying.

And with the level of the five talents, the power of this secret art will also skyrocket.

this day.

Ye Tian went deep into the source land and saw a source person, and the other party had a high-level talent - the source force talent!

"Finally stepped into the area of the source people with advanced talents!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Previously, he had been wandering around the mid-level talent area, and the high-level talents on his body had been improved by using the mid-level talents.

Now that he has come to the high-level talent area, he can naturally improve all the talents on his body to the top.

"Crazy looking for a source person to kill like me, the speed is too fast, the original Yuan Gu Lord will definitely not dare to do this, I guess he hasn't met a source person with high-level talent in the source land for a hundred years!"

Ye Tian guessed.

If he had encountered it, the Lord of the Yuan Gu would have been killed long ago.

It was impossible for Ye Tian to hide around in the source place, and slowly wait for the source people to come to him, it would be too wasteful of time.

His time is limited, he can't waste it, he can't spend hundreds of thousands of years in the source zone.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to fight in the advanced area, copying and fusing talents, raising all his talents to the top, and constantly learning the martial arts on the source person, whether it was sword skills or other martial arts, he involved them one by one.

And there are a lot of resource treasures in the source land, but most of them are resources to improve the talent of comprehension, which is nothing in the outside world, but in the source land, these resources are precious, which can shorten the time for him to attain enlightenment.

In this way, 100 years have passed.

In the past hundred years, Ye Tian's physical fitness in the source land has not improved much, which is almost fixed, but his strength has increased many times, because his talents have all been improved to the top, and he has created a door knife technique, a door secret art, and even various tricks.

At this moment, Ye Tian gradually had a little understanding of the martial arts and rules of the source land.

In particular, his talent has reached the top level, and the next step is the arcane level, and he is about to come into contact with the rules and mysteries, so his understanding of the origin is far beyond that of the Lord of the Yuangu.

"The source has a big secret!"

Ye Tian realized this problem.

And it's a real big secret, a big secret that surpasses everything before, and he even feels that he has a problem with his previous talent!

That's right, the previous talent was problematic!
